summary: Defense neutralization completed by ACCEPTING the defense. The curmudgeon's advocate argument (eclipse shadow tracks apparent geometry, not physical sun altitude) was scientifically valid — confirmed by human verdict revert on 2026-04-13. EXP-140 contains replacement text patches for WIN-010 and WIN-068 that remove stale Self-Contradicted language and restore consistent Std Model Explains framing. The Std Model Explains case remains strong: Chapman 1933, no dome equation, FSF empirical, post-hoc, Kp asymmetry, circular calibration. Both WINs need their finding, tldr_verdict, and detail_verdict_text fields patched per EXP-140.
